mapper.select: SELECT FROM `expert_review_batch` WHERE `module_instance_id` = #{moduleInstanceId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND `round_no` = #{roundNo, jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `expert_review_batch` ( `module_instance_id`, `workflow_node_id`, `state_record_id`, `review_type`, `review_title`, `rule_type`, `min_expert_count`, `pass_score`, `recommend_score`, `remove_highest_lowest`, `expected_expert_count`, `submitted_expert_count`, `valid_expert_count`, `highest_score`, `lowest_score`, `final_score`, `final_result`, `rank_no`, `summary_comment`, `status`, `round_no`, `created_by`, `created_at`, `completed_at`, `updated_at` ) VALUES ( #{moduleInstanceId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{workflowNodeId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{stateRecordId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{reviewType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reviewTitle, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ruleType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{minExpertCount, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{passScore, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{recommendScore, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{removeHighestLowest, jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{expectedExpertCount, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{submittedExpertCount, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{validExpertCount, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{highestScore, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lowestScore, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{finalScore, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{finalResult, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rankNo, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{summaryComment, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{roundNo, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createdBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{completedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.update: UPDATE `expert_review_batch` SET `module_instance_id` = #{moduleInstanceId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, `workflow_node_id` = #{workflowNodeId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, `state_record_id` = #{stateRecordId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, `review_type` = #{reviewType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `review_title` = #{reviewTitle, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `rule_type` = #{ruleType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `min_expert_count` = #{minExpertCount, jdbcType=INTEGER}, `pass_score` = #{passScore, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, `recommend_score` = #{recommendScore, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, `remove_highest_lowest` = #{removeHighestLowest, jdbcType=TINYINT}, `expected_expert_count` = #{expectedExpertCount, jdbcType=INTEGER}, `submitted_expert_count` = #{submittedExpertCount, jdbcType=INTEGER}, `valid_expert_count` = #{validExpertCount, jdbcType=INTEGER}, `highest_score` = #{highestScore, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, `lowest_score` = #{lowestScore, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, `final_score` = #{finalScore, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, `final_result` = #{finalResult, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `rank_no` = #{rankNo, jdbcType=INTEGER}, `summary_comment` = #{summaryComment, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, `status` = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `round_no` = #{roundNo, jdbcType=INTEGER}, `created_by` = #{createdBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, `completed_at` = #{completedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, `updated_at` = #{updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE `batch_id` = #{batchId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
